dtsPropsFor.Bar: // No props — the active link is derived from the current route.
dtsPropsFor.BlogList: // No props — the post list is defined inside the component.
dtsPropsFor.ClashOfClans: // No props — stats are read from app/data/COC.json at build time.
dtsPropsFor.Contact: // No props — the contact links are defined inside the component.
dtsPropsFor.GetTime: // No props — coding time is fetched from /api/wakatime.
dtsPropsFor.GetTimeWrapper: // No props — wraps GetTime with its card styling.
dtsPropsFor.KalshiPositions:
/** DOM id applied to the root element, for deep-linking to the section. */
  id?: string;
dtsPropsFor.Links: // No props — the social links are defined inside the component.
dtsPropsFor.MiscProj: // No props — the video list is defined inside the component.
dtsPropsFor.NameAnim: // No props — plays the signature stroke animation once on mount.
dtsPropsFor.ProjectList: // No props — repositories come from app/data/repos.json.
dtsPropsFor.Skills: // No props — the skill groups are defined inside the component.
dtsPropsFor.SongList: // No props — songs are fetched from /api/songs, falling back to app/data/songs.json.
dtsPropsFor.ThemeToggle: // No props — reads and writes the `theme` key in localStorage.
dtsPropsFor.WorkExperience: // No props — the roles are defined inside the component.
